column3: ## Admin - Add, Edit, Resolve
Setup: At the top of the Testdrive page, the test title is shown followed by its ID, e.g. 'Flags (id: 234)'.
Setup: Usernames and record titles follow the `name__id` format. When the test says to log in as User__<id>, use the test ID, e.g. User__123.
Setup: During the test, you may see multiple records or users with the same name. Always select the one that matches your test ID.
Setup: All data in the Testdrive dashboard includes a copy button. You can use it to quickly copy the correct value and use it in the relevant place in the test.
Navigate to /testdrive/flags
In a separate tab, login as 'LordWiggleworth__<id>' (admin)
Open the "Feline Aerodynamics Review Journal__<id>" admin form - the url is provided in the testdrive

column4: Above the notes there is the Add Flag button visible and active

column3: Click Add Flag button

column4: An empty flag form is displayed

column3: In 'Assign an admin' input attempt to add username "MadamPonderleaf__<id>"

column4: No matches are found it is not possible to assign this user

column3: In 'Assign an admin' input add username "ProfessorQuibbleton__<id>" (admin)

column4: Username is found and it can be selected

column3: Select "ProfessorQuibbleton__<id>"
In the "Deadline" input attempt to add an improbable date (e.g., 2025-02-31)

column4: It's not possible to enter an improbable date

column3: In the "Deadline" input add a date in the past

column4: A warning "Provided deadline is in the past. Is it correct?" is displayed under the deadline input

column3: Save the form (do not close it)

column4: Journal form is saved correctly

column3: In deadline input add a date in exactly 1 week

column4: Warning disappears

column3: In text area add flag's note (any text)
Save application

column4: The flag is saved and additional data (Created by user at date) are displayed
All fields are editable
Add Flag button is disabled

column3: Close the application with Unlock & Close
Open "The Bermuda Triangle Journal of Lost and Found __<id>" admin form - the url is provided in the testdrive

column4: The record has a flag assigned to MadamPonderleaf__<id>
All flag fields are editable
Add Flag button is disabled

column3: Click Resolve Flag button

column4: The flag is marked as resolved
Add Flag button is active
Undo Resolving button is active

column3: Click Undo Resolving

column4: The flag is displayed in normal mode

column3: Click Resolve Flag
Click Add Flag

column4: A new empty flag form is displayed above the resolved flag
Add Flag button is disabled
Resolve Flag under the previous flag is disabled

column3: Click Cancel to cancel adding a flag

column4: The empty form is hidden
Undo Resolving and Add Flag buttons are active

column3: Click Add Flag button
Add a new flag, assign it to ProfessorQuibbleton__<id> and provide a note, then save the application

column4: The new flag is saved and displayed
The old flag was converted to a note with previous flag's details

column3: Click Unlock & Close to close the application
Open "Journal of Intergalactic Diplomacy record __<id>" admin journal form - the url is provided in the testdrive

column4: This record has a flag assigned to you (LordWiggleworth__<id>)
The flag is marked with a red flag icon
Resolve Flag button is active and all fields are editable
